author: mark
text:
stash artifact at `wip/bl-e802-stash` (commit 30f79c5) carries the full tests/common/mod.rs Phase 1B-1 implementation:

- per-thread `TEST_HOME` thread_local + lazy materialization
- `bl(cwd)` / `bl_as(cwd, identity)` set HOME automatically
- `new_repo()` stands up bare-remote + wires origin + seeds main commit
- `clone_from_remote` seeds main when empty-remote path was taken
- layout-aware helpers: `discover_state_repo`, `discover_tasks_dir`, `discover_stealth_tasks`, `worktree_path`, `per_clone_paths`, `claims_dir`, `lock_dir`, `plugins_auth_dir`, `worktrees_dir`, `test_xdg_bases`, `test_home_path`
- `git_state`, `commit_state_repo`, `push` (tolerant of unborn main), `pull`, `read_task_json`, `read_task_notes` rewired through the new helpers

Bulk `.balls-worktrees/<id>` → `worktree_path(repo, id)` mechanical replacement covers the ~30 test files in the stash's diff.

Apply: `git stash apply wip/bl-e802-stash` from a worktree at base commit 1cbdf0b — that's where every `work/*` branch sits today, so it should be conflict-free. Selectively keep tests/common/mod.rs only for this phase; src/ changes belong to 1B-2 / 1B-5 / 1B-6.
